title: Totalize sum of columns
excerpt: Hello Group, I would like help on how to indicate the total of the sum of all the values ​​in a column (in the image SUB-QTY HH) I need it to be totaled below as the other 2 columns are. Please help and guide me.

posts.author: JLorca (Juan Lorca)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Group, I would like help on how to indicate the total of the sum of all the values ​​in a column (in the image SUB-QTY HH) I need it to be totaled below as the other 2 columns are. Please help and guide me.

Ejemplo800×394 37.7 KB

posts.author: Monica.hutchinson (Monica Hutchinson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Juan! A quick fix would be to change the column type. If you click the 3 dots that appear by the title of the column, you’ll select change column type and select number. It should automatically show the sum at the bottom of the column! There’s also an option in settings after clicking the three dots to either hide or show the column summary. Hope that helps!

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JLorca can I ask a few more questions to help you?

What type of column is this?
Does it give you any options for units or totals? Normally for a number column if you click the blank space at the bottom it will give you the options to “SUM” etc

If this data is brought in through an API you might want to check its in a supported column format - Column types reference
